description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a combination of glass, concrete, and wood exterior finishes. The structure features several large windows, including floor-to-ceiling glass panels, and multiple balconies with glass railings. There is a rooftop garden area, a spacious wooden deck, and an outdoor swimming pool. The house includes a garage, a main entryway with steps, and landscaped surroundings with trees and shrubs. The design emphasizes open, interconnected spaces and clean, geometric lines. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on natural light and outdoor living.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, a rooftop garden, and an outdoor pool, featuring sleek lines and a mix of concrete, glass, and wood finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, large windows, central entryway, garage, and pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop garden, rear deck, and secondary building structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, back entrance, and extensive wooden deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible pool, secondary structure, and landscaped trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, large glass door, and minimal overhang, flanked by windows and landscaping
